                                                                                         CONNECT ALL NEW GENERAL AND DEDICATED RECEPTACLES TO THE NEAREST EXISTING PANEL                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                         SERVING THE SPACE. CONNECT THEM TO AVAILABLE SPARE BREAKERS. PROVIDE NEW BREAKERS AS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                         REQUIRED. THE ELECTRICAL CONTRACTOR SHALL VERIFY IN THE FIELD THAT THE EXISTING PANEL                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                         DOES NOT EXCEED 80% OF ITS LOAD CAPACITY.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                         1. FOR GENERAL RECEPTACLES, CONNECT A MAXIMUM OF 10 RECEPTACLES PER CIRCUIT HOMERUN.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                         2. PROVIDE A DEDICATED CIRCUIT HOMERUN FOR DWELLING EQUIPMENT SUCH AS ELECTRIC DRYERS,                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                          WASHERS, REFRIGERATORS, DISHWASHERS, WASTE DISPOSALS, MICROWAVES, OVENS, HOOD, ETC.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                         3. PROVIDE A MINIMUM OF TWO CIRCUIT HOMERUNS FOR RECEPTACLES INSTALLED ABOVE COUNTERS.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                         4. PROVIDE A DEDICATED CIRCUIT HOMERUN FOR BATHROOM RECEPTACLES IN COMPLIANCE WITH CEC.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                         5. ALL RECEPTACLES SERVING COUNTERTOP SURFACES IN DWELLING KITCHENS MUST BE GFCI-PROTECTED.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                         6. ALL RECEPTACLES WITHIN 6 FEET OF A SINK, LOCATED OUTSIDE OF KITCHENS, MUST BE GFCI-PROTECTED.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                         7. CONNECT BATHROOM EXHAUST FAN TO BATHROOM LIGHTING CIRCUIT.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         ELECTRICAL  GENERAL    NOTES                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       CONNECT ALL NEW GENERAL AND DEDICATED RECEPTACLES TO THE NEAREST EXISTING PANEL                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       SERVING THE SPACE. CONNECT THEM TO AVAILABLE SPARE BREAKERS. PROVIDE NEW BREAKERS AS                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       REQUIRED. THE ELECTRICAL CONTRACTOR SHALL VERIFY IN THE FIELD THAT THE EXISTING PANEL                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       DOES NOT EXCEED 80% OF ITS LOAD CAPACITY.                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       1. FOR GENERAL RECEPTACLES, CONNECT A MAXIMUM OF 10 RECEPTACLES PER CIRCUIT HOMERUN.                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       2. PROVIDE A DEDICATED CIRCUIT HOMERUN FOR DWELLING EQUIPMENT SUCH AS ELECTRIC DRYERS,                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         WASHERS, REFRIGERATORS, DISHWASHERS, WASTE DISPOSALS, MICROWAVES, OVENS, HOOD, ETC.                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       3. PROVIDE A MINIMUM OF TWO CIRCUIT HOMERUNS FOR RECEPTACLES INSTALLED ABOVE COUNTERS.                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       4. PROVIDE A DEDICATED CIRCUIT HOMERUN FOR BATHROOM RECEPTACLES IN COMPLIANCE WITH CEC.                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       5. ALL RECEPTACLES SERVING COUNTERTOP SURFACES IN DWELLING KITCHENS MUST BE GFCI-PROTECTED.                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       6. ALL RECEPTACLES WITHIN 6 FEET OF A SINK, LOCATED OUTSIDE OF KITCHENS, MUST BE GFCI-PROTECTED.

CONNECT BATHROOM EXHAUST FAN TO BATHROOM LIGHTING CIRCUIT. PROVIDE SEPARATE SWITCH CONTROL

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 1.  ALL ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND FEEDERS ARE EXISTING UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTED AS                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     "(N)" FOR NEW.                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 2.  TORQUE ALL TERMINATIONS PER MANUFACTURER RECOMMENDATION.                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 3.  PROVIDE PHENOLIC NAMEPLATE LABELING & TYPE WRITTEN PANEL DIRECTORY FOR ALL                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     PANELS (EXISTING OR NEW).                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 4.  INTERIOR METAL PIPING SYSTEM SHALL BE BONDED TO THE GROUNDING ELECTRODE                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     SYSTEM.                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     GROUND AND NEUTRAL SHALL ONLY BE BONDED AT THE SERVICE EQUIPMENT AND AT THE                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     SEPARATELY DERIVED SYSTEM.                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     ONLY U.L LISTED EQUIPMENT SHALL BE USED.                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     PROVIDE ALL NECESSARY SIGNAGE, LABELING AND PLAQUES AS REQUIRED BY CEC                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     230.70(B), 695 & 700.                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     ELECTRICAL CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE MAIN LUGS & ADAPTOR LUGS AS NEEDED FOR                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     CONNECTIONS AT PANEL BOARDS AND EQUIPMENT.                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     ELECTRICAL CONTRACTOR TO PROVIDE ALL FUSES AS REQUIRED.
